summary: Test suite covers core logic (status calculation, report grouping, format output) and attempts integration via act, but has critical gaps. Missing: (1) all error scenarios (invalid JSON, malformed secrets, missing fields, empty arrays); (2) entry-point parameter handling and validation; (3) verification that fixture data matches hardcoded test expectations. ActExecution.Tests makes assertions on console output patterns (e.g., 'ROTATION-STATUS: SECRET_ALPHA=Expired(37)') without showing where those patterns are generated in the workflow—either the workflow code is missing or the test assertions are incorrect/aspirational. Edge case coverage is thin (no tests for very large policy days, negative days, zero-day secrets, multiple RequiredBy services, etc.). External dependencies (git, docker, act) make ActExecution.Tests fragile and untestable in isolation. Unit tests are well-organized and readable, but overall the suite would catch some regressions while missing error paths and integration correctness.
